reviews.comment:
Viernes 12 de agosto  2022  15:14hs.
Adelante mío había un hombre que pago una bebida con 1000$ y la cajera le dice "que ganas de complicarme la vida.
Después a mi me atendió re mal. Le pedí cubiertos para cortar unas empanadas que iba a comprar ahí y me contesta "cubiertos para una empanada". A ella que le importa si como la empanada entera o la corto al medio para comerla? La verdad una atención de mierd*

(Translated by Google)
Friday, August 12, 2022, 3:14 PM.
In front of me was a man who paid for a drink with $1000, and the cashier said to him, "Why are you trying to make things difficult for me?" Then she treated me terribly. I asked for utensils to cut some empanadas I was going to buy there, and she replied, "Utensils for one empanada." What does she care if I eat the whole empanada or cut it in half? Honestly, the service was awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1bUlXc3J3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son muy atentos.
Siempre hay gente porque los socios del ACA cargamos aquí. Me gustaría que arreglen el tema de los posnet ya que la señal no parece buena o son tantos los medios de pago que los playeros van de una caja a otra hasta que enganchan la señal...o no sé si las aplicaciones son las que funcionan mal...

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are very helpful. There are always people here because ACA members fill up here. I'd like them to fix the POS terminals, as the signal doesn't seem to be good, or there are so many payment methods that the attendants keep going from one register to another until they get a signal... or maybe the apps are malfunctioning...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1ODUyM3JnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1ODduRWR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen lo mínimo indispensable. Es un local pequeño y al paso. La atención sí, muy buena.
Antes solían tener opciones de comidas y espacio para socios del ACA y ahora es mínimo y en nuestro caso, que pasamos un domingo para aprovechar a salir un rato de la panamericana cargada, no tenían nada más que algunas medialunas. Al parecer solo hacen comida de lunes a viernes, malísimo. Ni unas papafritas o algo que no sea empaquetado de kiosco.
En cuanto a la limpieza y baños, todo estuvo muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
They have the bare minimum. It's a small, fast-food place. The service, however, is very good.
They used to have food options and a space for ACA members, but now it's minimal. In our case, since we were there on a Sunday to escape the busy Pan-American Highway for a while, they had nothing but a few croissants. Apparently, they only serve food Monday through Friday, and it's terrible. Not even fries or anything that isn't pre-packaged from a kiosk.
As for cleanliness and the restrooms, everything was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dzVybzFBRRAB
